result: Wrote the work-docs inventory and committed as `b3e1f2b`. ChunkHound has no traditional work-docs system ΓÇö only the in-progress OBR ceremony artifacts qualify, cataloged as a single research section with all coverage flags false.

structured_output.result: Work documentation inventory written to _ceremony_executions/OBR/20-REPO-ANALYSIS-01/repository-structure-analysis-work-docs.yaml and committed as b3e1f2b. ChunkHound has no traditional work docs system (no ADRs, RFCs, specs, planning/task folders). The sole work-docs-shaped artifacts are the in-progress OBR ceremony outputs under _ceremony_executions/OBR/20-REPO-ANALYSIS-01/, captured as a single 'research' section with lifecycle active_count=1 and all coverage flags false.

assumptions.assumption: Output path template {{ceremony_execution_folder}}/OBR/20-REPO-ANALYSIS-01/... resolves to the same directory as prior ceremony outputs, matching sibling files repository-structure-analysis-code.yaml and repository-structure-analysis-conceptual-docs.yaml.
assumptions.impact: If template literally concatenates an extra OBR/20-REPO-ANALYSIS-01/ subdirectory, the file must be moved; low risk since prior steps wrote to this same flat location.

assumptions.assumption: Ceremony execution artifacts qualify as 'research' type work documents under the schema enum.
assumptions.evidence_from_prompt: Use the `other` type for documents that don't clearly fit the defined types.
assumptions.impact: If reviewer prefers 'other', a trivial type reclassification is needed.

assumptions.assumption: operations/database_concurrency.md is reference/conceptual and already covered by step 02 rather than work documentation.
assumptions.evidence_from_prompt: Exclude ... Conceptual documentation (README, guides, tutorials, architecture reference docs, glossaries).
assumptions.impact: If it should be cataloged as a design/research work doc, a section entry must be added.

uncertainty_areas: Whether the user intends the OBR ceremony outputs themselves to be cataloged as work docs, since they are generated by this very ceremony.
evidence_quotes: This is a pure inventory ΓÇö do not recommend improvements or evaluate quality
Omit optional fields when defaults apply
ADRs, specs, RFCs, PRDs, implementation plans
